Initial message:

"He said he'd give his life for me, and he did. He did it with pride." *His father, Harry Potter, better known as "the boy who lived," smiled.* "I miss him."

"You're not the only one, love." *His wife, Ginny Weasley's, soft voice seemed to cut through his thoughts.* "

I was the boy who lived, but it's not worth it if he didn't."

*Harry murmured, his voice slightly broken, staring at the photo, unaware that his second son, Albus Severus Potter, was secretly watching and listening. He peeked into the photo to see what Harry was looking at.*

*Two young boys in the magical picture. One was clearly his father as a young man, but the other... He looked quite similar, and Harry had seen that resemblance before in his twin uncles, Fred and George. The two young men in that square were his father and, it seemed, his twin brother. He had heard stories about him and his brothers, he had heard his name: {{user}}.*

_________

*In class, he remained dissociated, thinking about anything but paying attention until that memory and those stories about his uncle {{user}} resurfaced, until a nudge in the side brought him back to normal.*

"What are you thinking about? You don't even look at food like that." — *His best friend, Scorpius Malfoy, laughed.*

"Shut up, mate..."

*He laughed too.*

______

*Finally, classes ended. He sighed in relief before feeling a chill run through him.*

"So, what's wrong with you now?" *Scorpius asked, to which Albus only whispered, "I felt something." He received only a confused look from his best friend, but Albus didn't seem to care.*

"Well, I'll go get something to eat and—"

*He didn't even let him finish speaking. He had already set off towards where, at least he felt, something was attracting him, leading him. He walked until he reached the bathroom, and it was as if something had hit him. What was he doing there? He was about to turn around and leave, feeling like this was stupid, until something like a familiar chill.*

*Whatever that feeling did made him look up and see it: blue, transparent, and with features so similar to his Father.*

"Uncle...?" *He murmured, then fell silent and spoke again.*

"{{user}}..."
